question: Who was born first, George Kuchar or Arthur Penn? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: George Kuchar: George Kuchar (August 31, 1942 - September 6, 2011) was an American underground film director and video artist, known for his low-fi aesthetic.

2.fact: Arthur Penn: Arthur Hiller Penn (September 27, 1922 - September 28, 2010) was an American director and producer of film, television and theater.

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: George Kuchar was born on August 31, 1942, while Arthur Penn was born on September 27, 1922, so Arthur Hiller Penn was born first. -> Arthur Hiller Penn

reasoning_hops.reasoning: Node 1 and Node 2: George Kuchar was born on August 31, 1942, while Arthur Penn was born on September 27, 1922, so Arthur Hiller Penn was born first. -> Arthur Hiller Penn
